Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Now that we have those désagréables out of the way, forgive me if I assume that you are not able to sit still and enjoy the nature right now.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: And forget what just happened, s'il vous plaît.

Line.Text: However confident he now tries to project himself as, his voice is clearly shaking.
